title: Multimodal Summarization of Complex Scientific Data
scenario: Create a prompt that will generate a multimodal summary of complex scientific data, including visualizations, statistical analysis, and text descriptions. The LLM output should be a JSON object containing the summary data, including multiple visualizations and a statistical analysis report.
constraints: Must include a clear description of the scientific data and the desired multimodal summary
Must incorporate multiple visualizations and a statistical analysis report

evaluationCriteria.description: Checks the accuracy and completeness of the multimodal summary, including the inclusion of multiple visualizations and a statistical analysis report
Evaluates the quality and thoroughness of the statistical analysis and data interpretation
Assesses the effectiveness and clarity of the visualizations in presenting the scientific data
Ensures the JSON output adheres to the target format and is free of errors or inconsistencies
